description: Шаблон для создания pilot profile нового клиента

criteria.name: message_clarity
criteria.description: How clear and understandable is the core message?

criteria.name: memorability
criteria.description: How likely is the creative to be remembered?

criteria.name: audience_fit
criteria.description: How well does the creative resonate with the target audience?

criteria.name: call_to_action
criteria.description: How effective and compelling is the call to action?

criteria.name: trust
criteria.description: Does the creative build or erode trust?

criteria.name: brand_fit
criteria.description: How well does the creative align with the brand's tone and guidelines?

criteria.name: negativity_risk
criteria.description: Risk of negative perception or backlash.

criteria.name: distinctiveness
criteria.description: How distinctive is the creative compared to competitors?
